product_overview: F_ETS is a Flutter web app for searching ETS exam sessions, managing exam-related data, and supporting student and department-head workflows. It also provides admin tools for authentication, exam management, reference catalogs, and grading.
core_goals: Search and browse available ETS exam sessions by academic criteria
Save and revisit favorite ETS exams
View the ESCOM campus map and highlight buildings
Allow administrators to sign in and manage ETS exams, catalogs, and jefe accounts
Let students register, sign in, enroll in ETS exams, and review their enrollment history
Let department heads sign in, review assigned ETS exams, and submit student grades

features.name: Public ETS Search
features.description: Users can search and filter available ETS exam sessions, inspect exam details, save exams to favorites, and export the current results list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a subject or career name -> Review the filtered exam list -> Open an exam to see its details
Navigate to / -> Open the filter panel -> Choose a career or turno filter -> Review the narrowed results
Navigate to / -> Type a subject or career name -> Review the filtered exam list -> Save an exam to favorites
Navigate to / -> Review the current exam list -> Export the results as a PDF
Navigate to / -> Review the current exam list -> Export the results as a calendar file

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Users can view locally saved ETS favorites and remove exams from that saved list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Guardados -> Review the saved exams list
Navigate to / -> Open Guardados -> Remove an exam from favorites -> See the list update

features.name: Campus Map
features.description: Users can open an interactive campus map and highlight buildings on the ESCOM campus.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Mapa -> View the campus map
Navigate to / -> Open Mapa -> Select a building on the map -> See the building highlighted

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Administrators can sign in with email and password to access the admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> Enter the admin area
Navigate to /admin-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> See an invalid-credentials message
Navigate to /admin-login -> Open the password recovery link -> Navigate to /forgot-password
Navigate to /admin-login -> Open the privacy policy link -> View the privacy policy page

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Administrators can request a password-reset email for their account.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email -> Submit the form -> See a success message
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill in email -> Submit the form -> See a validation or recovery error message

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated administrators can review aggregate ETS statistics for the current period.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open Dashboard -> Review the statistics cards and counts

features.name: Admin Exams Management
features.description: Authenticated administrators can view, create, edit, and delete ETS exam records.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open Exámenes -> Review the exam list
Navigate to /admin -> Open Exámenes -> Add a new exam -> Fill in exam details -> Submit the form -> See the new exam in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Open Exámenes -> Select an exam -> Edit its details -> Submit the form -> See the updated exam in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Open Exámenes -> Delete an exam -> See the list update

features.name: Admin Catalogs
features.description: Authenticated administrators can browse reference catalogs for buildings, rooms, and careers.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open Catálogos -> Browse the buildings, rooms, and careers lists

features.name: Admin Jefes Management
features.description: Authenticated administrators can manage jefe de academia accounts linked to an academia.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open Jefes -> Review the jefe accounts list
Navigate to /admin -> Open Jefes -> Add a new jefe -> Fill in name, email, password, and academia -> Submit the form -> See the new jefe in the list
Navigate to /admin -> Open Jefes -> Delete a jefe -> See the list update

features.name: Alumno Login and Registration
features.description: Students can sign in to their account or register a new account with their academic details.
user_flows: Navigate to /alumno-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> Enter the student area
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> See an invalid-credentials message
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Open the registration link -> Fill in name, boleta, email, carrera, and password -> Submit the form -> See a registration success message
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Open the registration link -> Fill in the registration form -> Submit the form -> See a registration validation or creation error message

features.name: Alumno ETS Enrollment
features.description: Signed-in students can browse available ETS exams, inspect details, and enroll in an exam session.
user_flows: Navigate to /alumno-login -> Sign in successfully -> View the available ETS exams list
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open an ETS exam -> View the exam details
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open an ETS exam -> Enroll in the exam -> See an enrollment confirmation
Navigate to /alumno-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open an ETS exam -> Enroll in the same exam again -> See a message that the exam is already enrolled

features.name: Alumno Inscripciones
features.description: Signed-in students can view their ETS enrollment history and grades when available.
user_flows: Navigate to /alumno-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open Mis inscripciones -> Review the enrollment history and grades

features.name: Jefe Login
features.description: Department heads can sign in with email and password to access their management area.
user_flows: Navigate to /jefe-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> Enter the jefe area
Navigate to /jefe-login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the form -> See an invalid-credentials message

features.name: Jefe ETS and Grade Management
features.description: Signed-in department heads can view assigned ETS sessions, inspect enrolled students, and submit grades.
user_flows: Navigate to /jefe-login -> Sign in successfully -> View the assigned ETS sessions list
Navigate to /jefe-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open an ETS session -> View the enrolled students list
Navigate to /jefe-login -> Sign in successfully -> Open an ETS session -> Enter grades for students -> Save the grades -> See a save confirmation

tech_stack.other: get_it (DI), dartz (Either), shared_preferences, http, url_launcher, uuid, share_plus, path_provider

routes.description: Public home shell with bottom nav (Buscar, Guardados, Mapa) and role-access popup menu
Admin login with email and password via Supabase auth
Admin shell with bottom nav (Dashboard, Exámenes, Catálogos, Jefes) and logout
Send password-reset email to admin account
Confirm new password after clicking email reset link
Student (alumno) login with email and password
Department head (jefe de academia) login with email and password

features.name: Public ETS Search
features.description: Search and filter available ETS (special exams) by career, subject or turn; export results as PDF or ICS calendar file
user_interactions: Type text in the search bar to filter exams by subject or career
Open filter sheet to narrow results by career (ISC, LCD, IIA) or turno
Tap an exam card to see details
Tap the PDF export button to download the current list as PDF
Tap the ICS export button to download calendar file
Tap the bookmark icon on an exam card to save it to favorites

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on 'ets' table joined with carrera_materia, salon, edificio, periodoets

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Locally save and manage favorite ETS exams using shared_preferences
user_interactions: Tap the Guardados tab in the bottom nav to see saved exams
Tap the bookmark icon to remove an exam from favorites

features.name: Campus Map
features.description: Interactive painted map of ESCOM campus buildings with pulsing pin and building highlight
user_interactions: Tap the Mapa tab in the bottom nav to see the campus map
Tap a building on the map to highlight it

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Administrators sign in with email and password via Supabase auth; on success, navigate to /admin
user_interactions: Tap the login icon in the bottom nav popup and select Administrador
Fill the email field
Fill the password field
Tap the Entrar button to submit
See shake animation and snackbar on invalid credentials
Tap ¿Olvidaste tu contraseña? to go to forgot password
Tap Política de privacidad to open the privacy policy page

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase auth.signInWithPassword

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Send a password-reset link to the admin's email address
user_interactions: Fill the email field
Tap the send button
See success or error message

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase auth.resetPasswordForEmail

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View aggregate statistics (total exams, enrollments, active exams, etc.)
user_interactions: View stats cards with exam and enrollment counts

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase queries on ets and inscripcionets tables

features.name: Admin Exams Management
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete ETS exam records including date, salon, career-subject, and jefe assignments
user_interactions: Tap the Exámenes tab in admin bottom nav
Tap the add button to open the exam form
Fill in exam details (date, turno, salon, career-subject, jefe)
Submit to create a new exam
Tap an exam to edit its details
Tap delete to remove an exam

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on ets table
Supabase insert on ets table
Supabase update on ets table
Supabase delete on ets table

features.name: Admin Catalogs
features.description: View reference data for buildings (edificios), rooms (salones), and careers (carreras)
user_interactions: Tap the Catálogos tab in admin bottom nav
Browse lists of buildings, rooms, and careers

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase queries on edificio, salon, carrera tables

features.name: Admin Jefes Management
features.description: Create, read, and delete jefe de academia accounts linked to an academia
user_interactions: Tap the Jefes tab in admin bottom nav
Tap the add button to create a new jefe
Fill in name, email, password, and academia fields
Tap delete to remove a jefe

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on jefeacademia and usuario tables
Supabase insert on jefeacademia and usuario tables
Supabase delete on jefeacademia table

features.name: Alumno Login
features.description: Students sign in with their email and password to access their personal ETS panel
user_interactions: Tap the login icon in the bottom nav popup and select Soy alumno
Fill the email field
Fill the password field
Tap the login button
See error snackbar on invalid credentials
Tap the register link to go to registration

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on alumno and usuario tables

features.name: Alumno Registration
features.description: New students register an account with name, boleta, email, carrera, and password
user_interactions: Tap register link on the alumno login page
Fill in name, boleta, email, carrera, and password fields
Tap the register button to submit
See success or error message

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase insert on alumno and usuario tables

features.name: Alumno ETS Enrollment
features.description: Students browse available ETS exams and enroll in them
user_interactions: View list of available ETS exams after login
Tap an exam to view its details
Tap enroll button to register for the exam
See success or error confirmation

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on ets table filtered by active period
Supabase insert on inscripcionets table

features.name: Alumno Inscripciones
features.description: Students view their own ETS enrollment history and results
user_interactions: View list of enrolled ETS with status and grade if graded

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on inscripcionets joined with ets table filtered by alumno id

features.name: Jefe Login
features.description: Department heads (jefes de academia) sign in to manage their assigned ETS exams and grade students
user_interactions: Tap the login icon in the bottom nav popup and select Soy jefe de academia
Fill the email field
Fill the password field
Tap the login button
See error snackbar on invalid credentials

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on jefeacademia and usuario tables

features.name: Jefe ETS and Grade Management
features.description: Jefes view their assigned ETS exams, see enrolled students, and submit grades
user_interactions: View list of ETS exams assigned to their academia
Tap an ETS to see enrolled students
Enter a grade for each student
Save grades

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase query on ets filtered by jefe id
Supabase query on inscripcionets joined with alumno table
Supabase update on inscripcionets table to set calificacion and resultado

known_limitations.issue: Social login button (Google) on the admin login page has an empty onTap handler — not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Clicking the Google login button does nothing

known_limitations.issue: Favorites are stored locally (shared_preferences) and not synced to backend
known_limitations.impact: Favorites are lost when local storage is cleared and are not available on other devices
